wine_hotels.name: Six Senses Douro Valley
wine_hotels.address: Quinta de Vale Abraão, Samodães, 5100-758 Lamego, Portugal
wine_hotels.description: A restored 19th-century manor above the Douro near Lamego, with a wine library, spa and tastings drawing on a deep Douro and Portuguese cellar.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Wine-library tastings, blind-tasting sessions and Douro vineyard excursions with the resident wine team

verified.address_quoted: Quinta de Vale Abraão, Samodães 5100-758 Lamego, Portugal

wine_hotels.name: The Yeatman
wine_hotels.address: Rua do Choupelo (Santa Marinha), 345, 4400-088 Vila Nova de Gaia, Portugal
wine_hotels.description: A luxury wine hotel in Gaia's cellar district with a 25,000-bottle cellar, a two-Michelin-star restaurant and a Caudalie vinotherapy spa overlooking Porto.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Daily Portuguese wine tastings, themed dinners and access to a 25,000-bottle cellar with pairing flights

verified.address_quoted: Rua do Choupelo (Santa Marinha), 345, 4400-088 Vila Nova de Gaia

wine_hotels.name: Quinta Nova Winery House
wine_hotels.address: Quinta Nova de Nossa Senhora do Carmo, Covas do Douro, 5085-222 Sabrosa, Portugal
wine_hotels.description: Portugal's first wine hotel, an 18th-century manor on a 120-hectare hilltop estate above the Douro, with its own winery, restaurant and vineyard tastings.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Estate tastings, vineyard and cellar tours, harvest participation and blending sessions with the Quinta Nova team

wine_hotels.name: Quinta de la Rosa
wine_hotels.address: Quinta de la Rosa, 5085-241 Pinhão, Portugal
wine_hotels.description: A working wine and Port estate on the right bank near Pinhão, in the Bergqvist family since 1906, with riverside rooms, a restaurant and tastings of the estate wines.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Cellar tours, estate wine and Port tastings, and vineyard walks above the Douro

verified.address_quoted: Quinta de la Rosa, 5085-241 Pinhão, Portugal

wine_hotels.name: The Vintage House - Douro
wine_hotels.description: A riverside hotel in the heart of Pinhão beside the Douro, with a wine bar and tasting programme drawing on the surrounding quintas and Port houses.
wine_hotels.wine_program: In-house wine bar tastings, Douro wine flights and arranged quinta visits from the riverside base

wine_hotels.name: Quinta do Vallado Wine Hotel
wine_hotels.address: Vilarinho dos Freires, 5050-364 Peso da Régua, Portugal
wine_hotels.neighborhood: Vilarinho dos Freires, Peso da Régua, Baixo Corgo
wine_hotels.description: A design hotel on a historic estate along the Corgo near Régua, built around an 1716 quinta once owned by Dona Antonia Ferreira, with daily cellar tastings.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Daily cellar visit and tasting, vineyard walks, picnics, boat trips and cooking classes built around the estate wines and Ports

verified.address_quoted: Vilarinho dos Freires, 5050-364 Peso da Régua

wine_hotels.name: Hotel Rural Quinta do Pégo
wine_hotels.address: Estrada Nacional 222, Valença do Douro, 5120-493 Tabuaço, Portugal
wine_hotels.description: A wine estate hotel on the EN222 above the Douro near Pinhão, with vineyard-view rooms, a pool and tastings of the estate's own Douro wines and Ports.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Estate wine and Port tastings, cellar visits and vineyard walks with river views

verified.address_quoted: National Road 222, Valença do Douro, PT-5120-493 Tabuaço

wine_hotels.name: Casa do Visconde de Chanceleiros
wine_hotels.neighborhood: Chanceleiros, Covas do Douro, Cima Corgo
wine_hotels.description: A restored manor house in the hills above Pinhão with vineyard views, a pool and a wine cellar, used as a quiet base for visiting the surrounding Douro quintas.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Cellar tastings and arranged visits to neighbouring quintas across the Cima Corgo
